prompt: A sprite sheet of a blonde little girl in a blue tunic and boots, holding a small sword, slashing forward. Pixel art style. Side view. Each frame is 128x128 pixels, arranged in a single horizontal row (total 4 frames). Transparent background. Consistent design across frames.
prompt_refined: Generate a 4-frame pixel art sprite sheet of a blonde little girl in a blue tunic and boots, holding a small sword, performing a side-view forward slash. Each frame measures 128x128 pixels, and all frames are arranged horizontally in a single row. Maintain consistent character design and art style throughout all frames. The background must be transparent.
